questions.question: According to the news, which country says the U.S. troop withdrawal was expected?
questions.source_headline: Germany says U.S. troop withdrawal 'anticipated', Spain and Italy could be next
questions.explanation: Germany is the country that said the U.S. troop withdrawal was anticipated or expected.

questions.question: What airline is mentioned as shutting down in recent news?
questions.source_headline: Spirit Airlines shuts down after failing to reach a bailout deal, ending discount travel era
questions.explanation: Spirit Airlines is the discount airline that shut down after failing to reach a bailout deal.

questions.question: Which volcano in the Philippines recently erupted, causing thousands to evacuate?
questions.source_headline: Philippines says thousands evacuated as Mayon Volcano erupts
questions.explanation: Mayon Volcano is the volcano that erupted in the Philippines, causing thousands of people to evacuate.

questions.question: According to news reports, what did Chinese courts rule about companies firing workers?
options: Companies can only fire workers on weekends
Companies can't lay off workers due to AI
Companies can fire workers for any reason
questions.source_headline: Chinese court rules firms can't lay off workers on AI grounds
questions.explanation: Chinese courts ruled that companies cannot lay off workers just because of artificial intelligence or AI reasons.

questions.question: Which former leader of Myanmar was moved to house arrest according to military reports?
questions.source_headline: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
questions.explanation: Aung San Suu Kyi, the former leader of Myanmar, was moved to house arrest according to military reports.

questions.question: How many people were stabbed in a high school altercation over a vape pen?
questions.source_headline: Student charged after 5 stabbed at high school in violent altercation over vape pen
questions.explanation: Five people were stabbed in the high school incident that started over a vape pen.

questions.question: Which country is attracting more Chinese investment in its property sector as a safe haven?
questions.source_headline: Singapore's safe-haven status draws more Chinese capital into property sector
questions.explanation: Singapore is the country attracting more Chinese capital into its property sector due to its safe-haven status.

questions.question: An oil tanker was hijacked off the coast of which country?
questions.source_headline: Oil tanker hijacked off coast of Yemen and taken towards Somalia
questions.explanation: The oil tanker was hijacked off the coast of Yemen, though it was then taken towards Somalia.

questions.question: How long will a comet be gone after it disappears from New Zealand skies?
questions.source_headline: Comet visible in NZ skies for the next week, then gone for 170,000 years
questions.explanation: The comet will be gone for 170,000 years after it disappears from New Zealand skies.

questions.question: What type of advanced technology is raising concerns among Russian forces on the battlefield?
questions.source_headline: Ukraine battlefield: Advanced Ukrainian drones raise concerns among Russian forces
questions.explanation: Advanced Ukrainian drones are the technology raising concerns among Russian forces on the battlefield.
